'''pangazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uintaite|uintaite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uintaite|uintaite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pangazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængæzhæth|pængæzhæth]] || [[word:pængæzhæj|pængæzhæj]] || [[word:pængæzhæsh|pængæzhæsh]] || [[word:pængæzhæ|pængæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangangazhath|pangangazhath]] || [[word:pangangazhaj|pangangazhaj]] || [[word:pangangazhash|pangangazhash]] || [[word:pangangazha|pangangazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangazhath|pangazhath]] || [[word:pangazhaj|pangazhaj]] || [[word:pangazhash|pangazhash]] || [[word:pangazha|pangazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangafzhath|pangafzhath]] || [[word:pangafzhaj|pangafzhaj]] || [[word:pangafzhash|pangafzhash]] || [[word:pangafzhaf|pangafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pangazhatha|pangazhatha]] || [[word:pangazhaja|pangazhaja]] || [[word:pangazhasha|pangazhasha]] || [[word:pangazhaka|pangazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pangazhath|pangazhath]] || [[word:pangazhaj|pangazhaj]] || [[word:pangazhash|pangazhash]] || [[word:pangazha|pangazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pangazhathal|pangazhathal]] || [[word:pangazhajal|pangazhajal]] || [[word:pangazhashal|pangazhashal]] || [[word:pangazhakal|pangazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pangazhathatha|pangazhathatha]] || [[word:pangazhajaja|pangazhajaja]] || [[word:pangazhashasha|pangazhashasha]] || [[word:pangazhaka|pangazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pangazhathan|pangazhathan]] || [[word:pangazhajan|pangazhajan]] || [[word:pangazhashan|pangazhashan]] || [[word:pangazhakan|pangazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pangazhathaoro|pangazhathaoro]] || [[word:pangazhajaoro|pangazhajaoro]] || [[word:pangazhashaoro|pangazhashaoro]] || [[word:pangazhakaoro|pangazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
